run.note: Held-out behavioural questions only — analogous to, but never copied from, the clips used to build the identity. No specific case is fed back into the file.

held_out_questions.question: Given a brand-new greenfield service in your dominant stack, do you scaffold tests first or wire the happy path first?
A teammate proposes pulling in a heavyweight framework to solve a one-off script. How do you respond?
Mid-task the chosen approach turns out to be twice as long as expected. Do you push through or stop and re-plan?

iterations.general_identity_adjustment: Generalised the speed-vs-correctness heuristic and broadened the stack-preference note. No question/answer pair copied into the file.
No further change needed — the broadened heuristics already cover the held-out questions.

general_identity_adjustments: Broadened the stack-preference note so it extrapolates rather than memorises (section 6).
